hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os, time
f = '.claude/session_handoff.md'
if os.path.exists(f) and (time.time() - os.path.getmtime(f)) < 7200:
    with open(f) as fh:
        content = fh.read()
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'SessionStart', 'additionalContext': 'Session handoff:\n\n' + content}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
